title: Don't Look Now... We're Being Shot At!
posterAlt: Don't Look Now... We're Being Shot At! (1966) movie poster
tmdbOverview: During World War II, two French civilians and a downed British Bomber Crew set out from Paris to cross the demarcation line between Nazi-occupied Northern France and the South. From there they will be able to escape to England. First, they must avoid German troops – and the consequences of their own blunders.
synopsis: Don't Look Now... We're Being Shot At! (1966) is a comedy and war film from France and United Kingdom. It holds a solid 7.9 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 1960s and genre rankings. It carries a G certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
